title: dianthus sahandicus
intro: Dianthus sahandicus, also known as Sahaandan Pink or Iranian Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dianthus sahandicus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and cough, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Dianthus sahandicus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
